'''Freyborn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Imperial Remnant]] during the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He refused to believe that the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] was more capable of handling the [[Yuuzhan Vong|Far Outsiders]] and their [[biot]]s, even after the [[Battle of Borosk (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Borosk]]. He viewed them as the same "scum" that made up the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

{{Char-stub}}
